author: m1--full-system-adversarial-review
content: Observation: /ad skill failed due to 'chainlink' vs 'crosslink' command name mismatch in skill definition. Proceeding with manual structured adversarial review covering: (1) SQL injection in db.rs, (2) identity/signing security, (3) daemon resource leaks, (4) knowledge input validation, (5) fuzz coverage gaps, (6) dependency audit, (7) CI/CD review, (8) general code quality.
